name: Incoming Invoice Data Extractor
description: Extract structured, ERP-ready data (vendor, amounts, VAT, PO reference, line items) from a raw incoming invoice or OCR dump, flag missing mandatory fields, and match it against the purchase order before booking.
author: accilium

variables.name: INVOICE_TEXT
variables.description: The raw invoice text or OCR dump, as-is.
variables.example: Invoice #INV-2026-4471, ACME Supplies GmbH, VAT ATU12345678, dated 2026-07-01, net EUR 4,200.00, VAT 20% EUR 840.00, gross EUR 5,040.00, PO-2026-889...

variables.name: PO_DATA
variables.description: The purchase order details to reconcile the invoice against, if one exists.
variables.example: PO-2026-889: ACME Supplies GmbH, EUR 5,040.00 gross, currency EUR, terms net 30

variables.name: CONTEXT
variables.description: Company-specific booking rules relevant to this invoice (cost center logic, currency handling, VAT treatment).
variables.example: Foreign-currency invoices must be booked at the ECB rate on the invoice date; cost center defaults to the PO's cost center

example_input: INVOICE_TEXT: OCR dump of a EUR 5,040 invoice; PO_DATA: matching PO for EUR 5,040; CONTEXT: net 30 terms
